data.name: button1.Text
data.value: 偵測上次傳送是否完成，請稍候…

data.name: tableLayoutPanel1.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="lblStockerSlot_Pos" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="lblStockerSlot_Front" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="lblStockerSlot_FrontID_value" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="2" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="lblStockerSlot_BackID_value" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="3" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="lblStockerSlot_Grade" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="4" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="lblStockerSlot_Grade_value" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="5" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="lblStockerSlot_LotID" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="6" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="lblStockerSlot_LotID_value" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="7" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,12.5,Percent,12.5,Percent,12.5,Percent,12.5,Percent,12.5,Percent,12.5,Percent,12.5,Percent,12.5,Absolute,20" /><Rows Styles="Percent,100" /></TableLayoutSettings>
